extraction.one_line_summary: CAVENDISH Mark won bunch sprint in Château after early breakaway with KLUGE and VAN AVERMAET caught inside final 2km
tactical_patterns: Strong GC threat ASGREEN in early move forced panic chase despite sprint teams represented, revealing classification anxiety.
KLUGE/VAN AVERMAET break caught only inside 2km despite sprint representation earlier, showing peloton tolerance risk threshold varies by rider caliber.

rider_signals.ASGREEN Kasper: neutral: early move threatened VAN POEL's GC lead enough to force chase response
rider_signals.GUARNIERI Jacopo: negative: crashed inside final 2km but uninjured, indicating positioning error in approach
rider_signals.PHILIPPE Julian: positive: DECEUNINCK Quick-Step used world champion as final leadout for CAVENDISH, unconventional deployment reveals sprint hierarchy
